name: Steak with Thai Peanut Sauce
recipeIngredient: Reserved pepper steak - sliced across grain 1/4 inch thick
1 cup uncooked Jasmine Rice, cooked according to package directions
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender container, process peanut butter, garlic, water, soy sauce, lime juice, jalapeno pepper, ginger, sugar and cayenne until smooth.
2. Stir in yogurt.
3. To Serve: Heat the sauce in a medium skillet over low heat. Toss in sliced pepper steak until heated through. Serve over Jasmine rice. Sprinkle with thinly sliced green onions. Serves 4.
